task:
/home/user/Documents/floor_ref.ply and /home/user/Documents/floor_rotated.ply are ASCII PLYs with 800 points each forming an L-shape on the Z=0 plane. floor_rotated.ply is the reference cloud rotated 45 degrees around Z and translated.

Run point-pair-picking alignment using floor_rotated.ply as the to-be-aligned entity and floor_ref.ply as the reference, picking at least 3 matching point pairs on recognizable L-shape corners and applying the computed rigid transform. Export the transformed floor_rotated cloud as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/floor_aligned.ply. The result must have 800 points, and its bounding box must lie within [-1, -1, -0.5]..[11, 11, 0.5].
